title: XIIGen Solution Bundle
description: A named collection of features that together deliver a complete product domain. Bundles are activated by FLOW-00 (not FLOW-34). Each bundle carries default FREEDOM config that tenants inherit additively.

targetDomain.description: Business domain this bundle addresses (e.g. marketplace, community, content)

defaultFreedomConfig.description: D-BUNDLE-2: Pre-populates FREEDOM config values tenants inherit. Tenant overrides are additive — cannot remove keys set by bundle.

incompatibleWith.description: Bundle IDs that conflict with this bundle (symmetric — both directions must be declared)

requiredFlows.description: FLOW IDs that must be active for this bundle to function

minFlowVersions.description: Minimum promoted version required per flow. Used by FLOW-33 bundle degradation check.

status.description: Runtime status. DEGRADED = at least one required flow version is below minFlowVersions.

tenantId.description: Tenant this bundle is provisioned for (set by FLOW-00 at activation time)
